title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Piramal Pharma

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Piramal Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
